response_splitting.description: HTTP response splitting -- inject CRLF into response headers to create a second attacker-controlled HTTP response

probes.description: Full HTTP response splitting -- double CRLF terminates first response, injects complete second response with controlled body
Header injection via CRLF -- inject custom header to confirm response splitting prerequisite
Cookie injection via response splitting -- inject Set-Cookie header to set arbitrary cookies on victim

http_09_response.description: HTTP/0.9 response smuggling -- force server to return HTTP/0.9 response (no headers) so body is interpreted as raw content by intermediary

probes.description: HTTP/0.9 request -- server may respond without status line or headers, raw body interpreted differently by proxy vs browser

header_injection.description: Request header injection via user-controlled values -- inject headers into outgoing requests made by server-side code

probes.description: Request splitting via space + CRLF -- inject full second request into server-side HTTP client
Request splitting via literal escaped CRLF -- some HTTP libraries process escaped \r\n as actual CRLF
